message:
test(lifecycle): add capabilities HOME-independence row (ibuuh.23)

Third row of the ibuuh.23 validation matrix: cass capabilities --json
is a compile-time contract (feature list, connector list, limits) and
must not vary based on the resolved data dir. This row spawns two
independent isolated HOMEs and asserts their capabilities JSON is byte-
identical.

If a future change accidentally reads a runtime config file during
capabilities resolution (for example, a workspace-level 'which features
are enabled here' toggle), this test catches the leak before downstream
agents see inconsistent capability views between hosts.

3/3 pass, 3 consecutive stable re-runs.

Matrix now has: (1) concurrent_health_readings_agree_on_readiness_snapshot,
(2) cross_surface_version_agreement, (3) capabilities_surface_is_home_
independent.

Follow-up slice on coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.23; bead stays open
for the rows that need upstream scheduler / cleanup / quarantine
subsystems from in-flight ibuuh.30 / ibuuh.32.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
